mapper.insert:
insert into patsaas.fr_json_task(slide_id, special_id, image_id, single_id, organization_id, category_id, algorithm_uuid, code, json_path, status, times, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.slideId}, #{entity.specialId}, #{entity.imageId}, #{entity.singleId}, #{entity.organizationId}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.algorithmUuid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.jsonPath}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.times}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into patsaas.fr_json_task(slide_id, special_id, image_id, single_id, organization_id, category_id, algorithm_uuid, code, json_path, status, times, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.slideId}, #{entity.specialId}, #{entity.imageId}, #{entity.singleId}, #{entity.organizationId}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.algorithmUuid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.jsonPath}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.times}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update slide_id = values(slide_id) , special_id = values(special_id) , image_id = values(image_id) , single_id = values(single_id) , organization_id = values(organization_id) , category_id = values(category_id) , algorithm_uuid = values(algorithm_uuid) , code = values(code) , json_path = values(json_path) , status = values(status) , times = values(times) , start_time = values(start_time) , end_time = values(end_time) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time)
